title: hydrocotyle felipae
intro: Hydrocotyle felipae, also known as Brazilian pennywort, is a species of flowering plant in the water pennywort genus. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as anxiety, insomnia, and digestive problems, offering health benefits like reduced stress levels and improved digestion. Hydrocotyle felipae can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, for its medicinal and therapeutic effects.
